### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors')

## UnpublishedEventsRecord Class

Tracks unpublished events for drain recovery after publication failure\.
Stored in actor state with key prefix "drain:" for automatic recovery
via DAPR actor reminders \(Story 4\.4\)\.

```csharp
public record UnpublishedEventsRecord : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.UnpublishedEventsRecord>
```
